candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on the balance sheet; matches ACT definition directly.
Only a component of current assets, not the total.
Component of current assets, not total current assets.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current assets.

variables.notes: Chose the reported total current assets line from the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; best match for CHE.
Restricted cash is not the standard CHE measure.
Potential synonym, but appears blank and less clearly the reported line than the explicit cash and cash equivalents row.

candidates.row_label: Closing balance for cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Cash flow statement closing balance can reconcile, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit balance-sheet cash line over cash-flow closing balance.

candidates.why: Exact total current liabilities line on the balance sheet; matches LCT directly.
Only a component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Wrong section; non-current rather than current liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose the reported total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best clean current debt line on the balance sheet; directly represents short-term interest-bearing debt and excludes leases by label.
Financing-related current borrowing shown separately; likely part of short-term debt if not included in current interest-bearing debt.
Would be relevant if populated, but appears blank in preview and less informative than reported debt lines.

variables.notes: Chose two non-lease financing current liability rows outside/alongside the shortlist because they appear to be the minimal set representing short-term debt. Did not include current lease liabilities or capital lease maturities.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable / income tax payable balance-sheet line; best match for TXP.
Cash flow item, not taxes payable on the balance sheet.
Deferred tax is not taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided, but this is a clear balance-sheet taxes payable label.

candidates.why: Best reported aggregate PPE-style line on the balance sheet; appears to represent tangible fixed assets net, preferable to balancing rows or individual components.

candidates.row_label: Total Tangible Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Semantically close to total PPE, but explicitly a balancing line and therefore less preferred.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.
Only a component of PPE, not total PPE.

variables.notes: Selected a confident label outside the shortlist. 'Fixed assets' is the clean reported aggregate tangible fixed assets/PPE line and is preferable to balancing rows or lease-specific rows.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; direct match for AT.
Exact operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement; direct match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal/balancing item, not final net operating cash flow.

variables.notes: Used the explicit net operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
